name: GIGABYTE B760 DS3H WIFI6E GEN5 ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - Supports DDR5-5600 - Intel B760 Chipset - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 4x PCIe 3.0 x1 - 2x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen 2x2 Type-C - DisplayPort 1.2 - HDMI 2.1 - Realtek GbE LAN - Wi-Fi 6E 802.11ax
shortName: GIGABYTE B760 DS3H WIFI6E GEN5 ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700
description: Mid-range Intel ATX motherboard with LGA 1700 socket and B760 chipset, featuring PCIe 5.0 and Wi-Fi 6E.
